note: Agent and gold use different patent samples, so direct correlation is not computed. Evaluation focuses on methodology correctness and component identification.

indicator_correctness.new_word: CORRECT: count of new unigrams by filing date
indicator_correctness.new_bigram: CORRECT: consecutive keyword pairs, first-seen check
indicator_correctness.new_trigram: CORRECT: consecutive keyword triples, first-seen check
indicator_correctness.cosine_similarity: CORRECT: 1 - backward_cosine using binary TF vectors
indicator_correctness.new_bigram_reuse: CORRECT: same formula for new bigrams
indicator_correctness.new_trigram_reuse: CORRECT: same formula for new trigrams
indicator_correctness.new_word_comb_reuse: CORRECT: same formula for new word pairs (but no cap on reuse counting)
